data.title: detect-stack.sh returns 'unknown' when app lives in subdirectory not repo root
data.description: During onboarding, detect-stack.sh scans the repo root but the actual app may be in a subdirectory (e.g. courtney-app/). In this case, a Next.js 15 + React 18 + TypeScript project was not detected and the script returned 'unknown'. Detection must scan subdirectories.
